evals.prompt: 列出在线服务，如果有可用项再给我 Hub 页面链接。
evals.expected_output: Uses network services --online and optionally ui open --page hub for human browsing.

evals.prompt: 把 http://127.0.0.1:4827 这个目录源加进来，标签叫 weather-demo，然后重新列一遍 sources。
evals.expected_output: Uses network sources add/list and treats source state as local registry.

evals.prompt: 帮我直接调用这个远程服务并持续看 trace。
evals.expected_output: Should NOT execute services call in network-manage. Should hand off to call-remote-service.
